data.title: Komax Shareholders Back Board Proposals and Cost-Cutting Drive
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Komax Holding AG ( (CH:KOMN) ) has issued an update.

Shareholders of Komax Holding AG approved all proposals put forward by the Board of Directors at the Annual General Meeting in Lucerne, with 55% of the share capital represented. They confirmed Andreas Häberli as Chairman, re-elected the other five board members standing, and reduced the board size after long-serving director David Dean stepped down under a 12-year term limit, while paying tribute to outgoing CEO Matijas Meyer for his 19 years of service.

Häberli highlighted that Komax has implemented successful cost-cutting measures in response to a challenging environment marked by a weak European automotive sector, a strong Swiss franc, and geopolitical uncertainties. The company has sustainably lowered its cost base by CHF 25 million, leaving the Komax Group better prepared for the new financial year and reinforcing its positioning in the automation and cable-processing market.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:KOMN) stock is a Hold with a CHF80.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Komax Holding AG stock, see the CH:KOMN Stock Forecast page.

More about Komax Holding AG

Komax Holding AG is a globally active technology group specializing in automation solutions, particularly as a leading manufacturer of innovative, high-quality cable-processing systems. Serving primarily automotive suppliers, the group supports efficient and safe production processes and operates through more than 3,100 employees in over 60 countries via subsidiaries and representatives.

Average Trading Volume: 26,638

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: CHF271.2M

data.title: Solaris Resources Wins EIA Approval for Warintza, Unlocks US$50 Million Financing
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Solaris Resources ( (TSE:SLS) ) is now available.

On April 9, 2026, Solaris Resources reported that it had received technical approval of the Environmental Impact Assessment for its Warintza copper project in southeastern Ecuador. The approval followed a multi-year government review of environmental, engineering and social management plans, marking a major permitting milestone that substantially de-risks one of the world’s significant undeveloped copper assets.

The EIA technical approval also triggered access to a second US$50 million tranche under Solaris’s existing US$200 million financing agreement with Royal Gold, further bolstering the company’s balance sheet. Together with a pre-feasibility study completed in November 2025 and ongoing permitting steps, the decision supports continued advancement of Warintza’s development, infrastructure planning and exploration, with important implications for the project’s path toward full permitting and long-term growth for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SLS) stock is a Sell with a C$10.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Solaris Resources stock, see the TSE:SLS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative equity), partially offset by the notable improvement to positive operating and free cash flow in 2025. Technical indicators are generally bearish in the short term, and valuation signals remain unattractive due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on SLS stock, click here.

More about Solaris Resources

Solaris Resources Inc. is a copper-gold exploration and development company with a portfolio of assets across the Americas. Its flagship asset is the 100%-owned Warintza copper porphyry project in southeastern Ecuador, where the company emphasizes responsible mining practices, environmental stewardship and long-term value creation for local communities and stakeholders.

data.title: Lemon Sistemi Wins €1.5 Million Contract for Two Sicilian Solar Plants
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Lemon Sistemi S.P.A. ( (IT:LS) ).

Lemon Sistemi S.p.A. has signed a €1.5 million contract with Sicilian marble and granite producer Alfa Graniti S.r.l. to design and build two photovoltaic plants in the province of Ragusa. The projects, located in Comiso and Chiaramonte Gulfi and partially installed on Alfa Graniti’s roofs and adjacent land, include design, installation, grid connection, testing and permitting activities managed entirely by Lemon Sistemi.

Work on the Comiso plant is scheduled to begin in the first half of 2026 with completion by year-end, while the Chiaramonte Gulfi facility is expected to be finished by the first half of 2027, with staged payments tied to construction milestones. The deal strengthens Lemon Sistemi’s existing relationship with Alfa Graniti and underscores its strategic focus on medium-sized photovoltaic projects for energy-intensive clients, reinforcing its role in industrial decarbonization and supporting greater energy independence amid ongoing energy market volatility.

More about Lemon Sistemi S.P.A.

Lemon Sistemi S.p.A., founded in 2009 in Balestrate, operates in the renewable energy and energy efficiency sector, focusing on the design, supply and installation of photovoltaic, thermo-hydraulic and storage systems. The company serves both retail and industrial/commercial clients through a fully integrated in-house model covering marketing, sales, design, installation, testing and after-sales support.

Average Trading Volume: 11,944

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €10.7M

data.title: VSBLTY Wins $2.5 Million Defense Contract for Governed Counter-Drone Intelligence Platform
data.description:

Vsblty Groupe Technologies ( (TSE:VSBY) ) has issued an announcement.

VSBLTY has secured a contract and initial US$2.5 million purchase order from U.S.-based systems integrator CRS Inc. to deploy its Sovereign Intelligence Core platform for an overseas national defense customer, enabling an operational early-warning and confirmation capability. The deployment will fuse inputs from airborne, ground, RF, radar, acoustic, satellite, and IoT sensors into a unified, governed intelligence environment optimized for counter-drone defense and critical infrastructure protection, with potential expansion to larger production rollouts if program milestones are met.

The platform’s key differentiator is its Governance Spine, which attaches a full provenance chain to each detection, aligning the system with rising auditability demands in defense procurement and emerging AI regulation. Executives from VSBLTY and CRS positioned the project as a milestone demonstration of governed AI for modern ISR and early-warning systems, potentially strengthening VSBLTY’s competitive standing in multi-domain defense and sensor fusion markets while showcasing scalable edge processing that reduces bandwidth needs for contested environments.

Despite some positive market momentum and strategic initiatives, the company’s financial instability and unfavorable valuation metrics contribute to a low overall score. While recent corporate events and earnings call provide a glimmer of hope, substantial improvements are needed to enhance the stock’s attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on VSBY stock, click here.

VSBLTY Groupe Technologies is a Philadelphia-based provider of AI-powered multi-sensor data fusion, edge computing, and governed operational intelligence platforms focused on defense, counter-drone operations, and critical infrastructure protection. Its silicon-agnostic Sovereign Intelligence architecture integrates diverse sensors and analytics to deliver auditable, policy-driven situational awareness for national security and high-value assets.

data.title: American Rebel Addresses Nasdaq Deficiency With Share Issuance
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from American Rebel Holdings ( (AREB) ) is now available.

On March 23, 2026, American Rebel Holdings implemented a 1-for-100 reverse stock split, which initially reduced its publicly held shares to about 247,279, triggering a Nasdaq deficiency notice for failing to meet the 500,000 publicly held shares requirement and prompting a Qualification Halt in trading of its securities. On April 6, 2026, the company issued 3,218,299 shares of restricted common stock to CEDE & Co. for distribution to shareholders as part of round-lot adjustments, bringing total outstanding shares to 3,451,665 and leading the company to believe it has cured the Nasdaq public float deficiency, a key step toward regaining full compliance with listing rules and resuming normal trading.

The most recent analyst rating on (AREB) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Rebel Holdings stock, see the AREB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AREB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AREB is a Underperform.

American Rebel Holdings is facing severe financial and operational challenges. The company’s financial performance is notably weak, with negative profitability and high leverage. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, and recent corporate events further exacerbate financial instability. The stock’s valuation is unattractive due to negative earnings and lack of dividends.

To see Spark’s full report on AREB stock, click here.

More about American Rebel Holdings

American Rebel Holdings operates as a publicly traded company whose shares are listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company manages its capital structure and share count in accordance with Nasdaq listing standards and U.S. securities regulations, including compliance with minimum bid price and publicly held share requirements that affect its continued exchange listing status.

data.title: Dreamland Limited Shareholders Approve Multi-Stage Share Consolidation at April 1 EGM
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Dreamland Limited Class A ( (TDIC) ) has issued an announcement.

Dreamland Limited held an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders in Hong Kong on April 1, 2026, at which holders of 60.12% of the company’s outstanding shares, representing 69.26% of voting power, were present in person or by proxy, satisfying quorum requirements for the meeting. Shareholders from both Class A and Class B share classes participated, with each Class A share carrying one vote and each Class B share carrying twelve votes, underscoring the company’s dual-class governance structure.

At the meeting, investors overwhelmingly approved a one-for-five consolidation of both issued and unissued Class A and Class B ordinary shares, increasing the par value per share while keeping the total authorized share capital unchanged. Shareholders also authorized the board to implement an additional share consolidation within a one-for-two to one-for-250 range within 180 days or to choose not to proceed, and empowered directors to manage fractional entitlements, moves that collectively give the company flexibility to adjust its capital structure, potentially support share price levels, and manage listing compliance or future corporate actions.

More about Dreamland Limited Class A

Dreamland Limited is a foreign private issuer incorporated outside the United States and listed in the U.S. equity markets, with dual-class share capital consisting of Class A and Class B ordinary shares. The company is headquartered in Hong Kong, where its principal executive offices are located in Cheung Sha Wan, Kowloon, reflecting a primary operating base in the Asia-Pacific region.

Average Trading Volume: 4,539,414

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.51M

An update from Northern Lights Resources ( (TSE:NLR) ) is now available.

Northern Lights Resources has closed the sale of its 1% net smelter return royalty on the Medicine Springs Project in Nevada to a subsidiary of Torex Gold Resources for US$2.2 million in cash, providing non-dilutive capital and streamlining its portfolio to focus on its core Canadian exploration assets. The company also plans a shares-for-debt settlement of up to 1,630,000 common shares at $0.12 to extinguish C$195,600 in liabilities, including amounts owed to insiders, a move that is expected to strengthen its balance sheet, better align stakeholders, and support advancement of its Pup and Horetzky projects, subject to Canadian Securities Exchange approval and regulatory conditions.

data.title: Leocor Mining to Spin Out Intrepid Metals Stake to Shareholders
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Leocor Gold ( (TSE:LECR) ) just unveiled an update.

Leocor Mining Inc. plans to distribute up to all of its 17,647,058 common shares of Intrepid Metals Corp., representing about 15.09% of Intrepid’s outstanding shares, to Leocor shareholders on a pro rata basis. The move aims to let investors participate directly in Intrepid’s progress while Leocor maintains its strategic focus on its Atlantic Canada gold-copper projects.

The distribution is expected to be carried out through a court-approved plan of arrangement under British Columbia corporate law, reorganizing each existing Leocor share into a new Leocor share plus an entitlement to Intrepid shares. Completion will require two-thirds shareholder approval, court approval and Canadian Securities Exchange acceptance, with the exchange ratio set at closing and designed to be tax-efficient for shareholders.

Leocor will determine the final number of Intrepid shares to be distributed and the exact exchange ratio based on the number of shares outstanding at the effective date. Fractional Intrepid share entitlements will be rounded down, with any residual fractions retained by Leocor, and existing warrants will adjust so that holders receive new Leocor shares with a reduced exercise price reflecting the distributed Intrepid value.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LECR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Leocor Gold stock, see the TSE:LECR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LECR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LECR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent negative operating/free cash flow alongside a shrinking equity base). Technicals are moderately supportive due to the price trading above key moving averages, but mixed momentum indicators limit conviction. Valuation provides limited support because the very low P/E is not meaningful for a pre-revenue, cash-burning company and there is no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on LECR stock, click here.

More about Leocor Gold

Leocor Mining Inc., formerly Leocor Gold Inc., is a Canadian mineral exploration company listed on the CSE, OTCQB and Frankfurt exchanges. The company focuses on advancing a gold-copper exploration portfolio in Atlantic Canada, including a contiguous land package in the Baie Verte Mining District, positioning it within the precious and base metals exploration sector.

Average Trading Volume: 82,897

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$8.87M

data.title: Matica Fintec Calls Remote AGM to Approve 2025 Accounts and Refresh Governance
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Matica Fintec SpA ( (IT:MFT) ) has shared an announcement.

Matica Fintec has published the notice convening its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, to be held by teleconference on 24 April 2026, with a possible second call on 7 May, and has updated the extract of this notice in the Italian financial daily Il Sole 24 Ore. The agenda includes approval of the 2025 financial statements and profit allocation, renewal of the statutory audit mandate for 2026‑2028, board changes following director resignations, and proposed increases to compensation for both the Board of Directors and the Board of Statutory Auditors, signaling continuing adjustments in governance and oversight structures.

The company confirmed its fully subscribed and paid‑in share capital of €17,290,745.50 divided into 34,581,491 ordinary shares, each carrying one vote, with no shares enjoying increased voting rights as of the notice date and 0.06% held as treasury stock. The meeting will be held exclusively through an appointed representative in line with Italian securities law, with detailed procedures for record date verification, intermediary communications, and proxy voting, underscoring Matica Fintec’s adherence to regulated market governance standards and the protection of shareholder participation rights in a remote setting.

More about Matica Fintec SpA

Matica Fintec S.p.A. is an Italian innovative SME listed on Euronext Growth Milan that designs, produces and markets high‑tech systems for issuing digital cards. Its primary customers are financial institutions and government bodies, positioning the company within the secure digital identity and payment solutions segment.

Average Trading Volume: 22,500

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €65.36M
